feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Not able to derive material Basic Data - Size/dimensions
entry.content:
Dear All

While creating material , not able to derive Basic Data - Size/dimensions first time, but when i enter some random value(ex: 1 or 2) in Size/dimensions, then click enter i can see  Size/Dimensions = length*width*height( as per  USMD_RULE_SERVICE_CROSS_ET )

Size/Dimensions -  0,000 is the BRF value

 

Could someone provide your inputs on this please?

Thank you in advance.

 

regards

Chandra.

entry.title: Dump MOVE_TO_LIT_NOTALLOWED_NODATA in SAP CRM side
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When the data is sent from ECC to CRM for the business partner...system end up with dump as below in CRM side.

I have just extended the standard structure BUS_EI_EXTERN with some additional fields with STRING format in both ECC and CRM side.

It ends up with generic error and can i know how to fix it.

Observed that in standard code as below runs if the structure holds the STRING format.

I have changed the same to CHAR on the additional fields that i have created. Is there any additional stuff which i need to take care ?

Dump happen in below statement :

Initial loop statement where logic starts:

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: SAP MDG-M: Duplicate Check not working despite correct Match Profile and CR configuration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am a beginner in SAP MDG and I'm currently trying to set up my first Duplicate Matching profile for Material Master (MM) using HANA Search. I want the system to trigger a duplicate warning during the Change Request "Check" or "Submit" step if the Material Description and Material Group match an existing record. However I dont get a popup and even if I press "Check" finds nothing at all.

I set the threshold and the duplication is checked inside the MATL01 Change Request 00 process. Here are some images:

I also read that for generic duplication check using DQM I need data services, but I didnt see anything like that in the turorials Ive watched. When accessing the Connector Administration Cockpit (ESH_COCKPIT), I see the following error: "Current system is a copy of another system" and the search object connector list is completely empty.

My questions:

1. Does the Duplicate Check in MDG require the ESH Search Object Connectors to be active/fixed, even if manual HANA search works?

2. Do I need SAP Data Services (DQM) for this basic HANA-based matching? (help.sap mentions it here: Preparing Data Services to Work With MDG for Generic Duplicate Check | SAP Help Portal, but I’m trying to use native HANA capabilities).

Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to setup Duplicate Checks on MDG Cloud Edition 2602?
entry.content:
Hi, I'm fairly new to MDG Cloud Edition and I can't find enough information online. Everything I find is either about on premise, private cloud or public cloud. The Cloud Edition page from sap is very high level, it doesn't go enough into details to be helpful.

Could someone explain the step by step to setup or configure Duplicate checks for Business Partners?
What are the possibilities there?

entry.title: Industry standard data model for maintaining Vendor Hierarchy, Global Ultimate Parent in MDG
entry.content: Please suggest Industry standard data model for maintaining Vendor Hierarchy, Global Ultimate Parent in MDG and its consumption model for Reporting

entry.title: How to implement method needs_confirmation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need a pop-up confirmation to appear when clicking the “Save” button in MDG-MM CRs.

I followed this blog post : Simple FPM message / confirmation box | SAP Blogs

That seemed promising to me.

I have a Z-feeder class that inherits from CL_MDG_BS_MAT_FEEDER_FORM_MAT, where the IF_FPM_GUIBB_FORM_EXT interface is already implemented.
The NEEDS_CONFIRMATION method is also available, but I can never redefine it because the interface is set to final.

Is there a way to integrate the method, or is there a better way to implement the requirement?

Thanks

entry.title: MDG Front-End to auto populate material master fields
entry.content:
Our customer (RTX) has a custom solution that allows them to:

- Receive a material from a PLM system, and auto create multiple materials in ECC with the same number, by adding suffixes to the number

- Auto populate fields in the material master for eg. if plant = 20, then MRP Controller is 200 

I know Pepsi developed a Flexible Framework that did this, have we done this for any other customers?

 

Thx

Arthur

entry.title: CR Not Visible in NWBC After Creation
entry.content:
SAP Master Data Governance #MDG I have configured a new Change Request (CR) type using the“Create Change Request Type” option under Process Modelling in MDGIMG. However, after completing the configuration, the newly created CR type is not visible in NWBC.

Although multiple CR types are available for the Material domain in the system, the others and newly configured CR type is not appearing.

was any one have help me, in identifying the missing configuration or steps required to make the CR type visible in NWBC.

entry.title: How to Map Vendor with Contact Person When data flow through Interface in MDG
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have requirement that we will be receiving Vendor & Contact Person data via Inbound Interface in MDG system.
 The process involves creating the contact person first, then creating the vendor, and finally establishing the relationship between the contact person and the vendor through the change request process.
Data is replicating through SOA in MDG system and for Creation of CR we are using BADI BP REPLRQ IN.
We need logic how to handle creation of contact person & Vendor also link them while creating auto CR.

entry.title: Issue in enabling custom attributes in UIBB for AD_POSTAL
entry.content:
Hello,

We could able to add custom attribute in Data model BP under AD_POSTAL entity. But newly added custom field not coming under GENIL Model. Because of this missing config we're unable to add field in BP_ADDRESS UI Component Configuration.

Please let us know how to add custom fields in BP_Address GENIL model.

 

Thanks

Raji

entry.title: Issue connection to the Practise System
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I currently performing the Hands-On Training MDG100 and therefore want to connect to the Practise System. 
For that I recieved a PDF manual with the Steps to connect to the System:
Server: wdflbmt2261.wdf.sap.corp
SID: T41
Instance: 00
Role of the server: MDG on SAP S/4HANA 2022
Client: 400 & 401
For this I connected to my SAP Logon (Version: 8000.1.3.1161, Build: 2204446, Patch Level 3) and connected a new Connection that looks like this: 

System Connection Parameters

Description: T41
System ID: T41
Instance Number: 00
SAProuter String: n/a (blank)
Application Server: wdflbmt2261.wdf.sap.corp

But when I try to login I get the following error message:

hostname 'wdflbmt2261.wdf.sap.corp' unknown
Check your application server name

I created a Ticket in SAP Learning Self Service couple of days ago but the response time takes around 1.5 days so I would like to ask if somebody from the Cummunity could support me on this issue?

entry.title: MDG consolidation match group discrepancy
entry.content: In MDG Consolidation. I am tring to run a process (Process A) for consolidation of Active records. I get match groups when I run with selection criteria where Business Partners with role FLVN01. However, when I run another process(Process B) for consolidation of Active records, this time selectioncriteria where Business Partners with role FLVN01 and country is Belgium which also gives me match groups.. However when I see the number of match groups for country Belgium in Process A (although containsalso match gorup from other countries I only focus on Belgium) and Process B it is not same.. Infact  Process A has less Match groups from the country Belgium compared to process B.It is not that the BP from Belgium is now part of a different atch gorup in process A, my question is it is not there in any match gorup in Process A but it is present in Process B. How can there be a difference if the same match rule was applied and the only difference is that I added country as Belgium in the selection criteria?

entry.title: sap mdg contact person "Enter correspondence language" error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing an issue in SAP MDG while creating a Contact Person under a Customer.

When I try to add a new contact person, I receive the following errors:

  • Enter a value for field Correspondence Language
  • Enter a value for field Country/Region Key

However:

  • These fields are not visible on the UI,
  • I am not able to maintain them manually,
  • As a result, I cannot proceed with the creation.

How can i solve this problem?

entry.title: Vendor blocked for posting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm new to SAP and I have been working for a few weeks now on MDG tasks.

I have one vendor which is blocked from posting and I need to know how this block was triggered. In the change history I get SAP_WFRT but this is general for any system change, and it's not helping. The change could have came from non-SAP system but how can I trace this back?

Appreciate all the help.

entry.title: SAP MDG inbound BP webservice, does not copy LongPartTaxId value from payload to staging area
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are facing an issue in processing the inbound BP webservice in SAP MDG.

After receiving BP supplier webservice from a third party system into MDG, the LongPartyTaxId value is not getting copied into staging area of the CR.

After debugging the implementaion class of Badi MDG_SE_BP_BULK_REPLRQ_IN, i found that the value from payload is not copied into LongPartyTaxId field in the IN parameter and therefore not passed into staging area and it leads to error 'Enter tax number for tax category'.

This issue happens only when payload contains tax type category 5 and above.

Kindly let me know the potential reason behind this.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to create Follow up cr plant wise in sap mdg by using api
entry.content:
Background:
Parent CR: Plants will be added to the cr and the cr will be activated,
then after create follow up cr plant wise.
CR1 For Plant 1: CR1 should contain only plant1 data
CR2 For Plant 2: CR2 should contain only plant 2 data.
I have configure follow up cr as Active for parallel change processing.
I am able to create parallel cr but in both cr I can see data for Plant 1 and Plant2.
I tried deleting the data by using Governance api and change request api.
cr,  but unable to do so
Is there any other way to achieve the required functionality?

entry.title: Looking for Standard SAP Solution for Master Data Creation Requests with Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to ask for guidance on whether SAP provides a standard solution for handling master data creation/change requests. Specifically for Equipment, including an approval workflow and automated creation in the system.

Current Situation in Our Company

We have a Master Data Coordinator who is responsible for creating and updating master data in SAP. Our current process looks like this:

  1. A user wants to create or change an equipment.
  2. The user fills out a manual form/template explaining the required data and the reason for the request.
  3. The user submits this form into an approval workflow in SAP PLM.
  4. After all approvals are completed, the Master Data Coordinator manually:
    • Opens the form
    • Copies/pastes all values into SAP
    • Creates or updates the equipment

Challenges

  • Manual copy/paste introduces a high risk of human error.
  • The process is slow and depends heavily on one person.
  • We want to reduce manual work and improve data quality.

What We Want to Achieve

We are looking for a standard SAP process or Fiori app that would allow:

  1. A user submits a request to create an equipment directly in SAP (via Fiori or another standard interface).
  2. The request to go through an approval workflow.
  3. After approval, the system should automatically create the equipment in SAP without manual intervention.

Essentially, we want to replace the manual form + manual data entry with a more integrated, automated, and error‑free process.

My Questions to the Community

  • Does SAP offer a standard Fiori app or standard workflow for equipment creation/change requests?
  • Is there a standard SAP component (e.g., PLM, EAM-specific apps) that supports:
    • Request submission
    • Approval workflow
    • Automatic creation of equipment after approval
  • If yes, what would be the recommended approach?

Why This Matters

We want to avoid building a large custom solution if SAP already provides something standard. Our goal is to:

  • Improve data quality
  • Reduce manual work
  • Minimize errors
  • Streamline the approval process

Any insights, recommendations, or experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: ALRTCATDEF - How to change the error message format from action FM (MDG)
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly help to get the ALRTCATDEF message in proper format.
I have done the ALRTCATDEF setup in my MDG system. In the action FM I am filling my return_tab with error messages.
If return_tab has error messges then AIF alert is triggered and also mail is triggered. The mail is configured in ALRTCATDEF in long/short message text tab. There, I am using container object to fill the message. Container object has message with type bapiret2. I am using that and only specified message filed with multiple lines as continuous text (&messages[].message[]&).

But when I get mail, whole bapiret2 structure also comes in mail.
Example: <msg_type> <msg_class> <msg_num> <message> <msg_v1> <msg_v2> etc.

(E ZMSG_CLS 009 Error in CR Request Error in CR Request)

But expectation is just the <message> since I added only the message field (&messages[].message[]&) like: Error in CR Request.

Did someone encountered such issue or this is just standard and SAP processes all the fields of return_tab?

If not please help me configure it correctly. Please fell free to ask any inputs.

Thanks,
Rahul

entry.title: ALRTCATDEF - How to change the error message format from action FM (MDG)
entry.content:
Hi all,

Kindly help to get the ALRTCATDEF message in proper format.

I have done the ALRTCATDEF setup in my MDG system. In the action FM I am filling my return_tab with error messages.

If return_tab has error messges then AIF alert is triggered and also mail is triggered. The mail is configured in ALRTCATDEF in long/short message text tab. There, I am using container object to fill the message. Container object has message with type bapiret2. I am using that and only specified message filed with multiple lines as continuous text (&messages[].message[]&).

 

But when I get mail, whole bapiret2 structure also comes in mail.

Example: <msg_type> <msg_class> <msg_num> <message> <msg_v1> <msg_v2> etc.

 

(E ZMSG_CLS 009 Error in CR Request Error in CR Request)

 

But expectation is just the <message> since I added only the message field (&messages[].message[]&) like: Error in CR Request.

 

Did someone encountered such issue or this is just standard and SAP processes all the fields of return_tab?

 

If not please help me configure it correctly. Please fell free to ask any inputs.

 

Thanks,

Rahul

entry.title: Top 14 Space consuming tables in MDG PMD system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please find the attached document list of Top 14 space consuming tables in MDG PMD system for your reference.
Top 14 Tables-

SWWCNTP0, USMD_PP_CDCDPOS, EDID4, ADRVP, BDCP2, EDIDS, SWWWIRET, APQD, SWP_NODEWI, SWW_WI2OBJ, SWPNODE, E071K, DOKTL.
Kindly review the file and suggest the required actions needed to perform to reduce the space of the table.


Thanks.
